segments.text: Tech'd, but that's probably not putting him in a great position
segments.original_text: 受け身とっても多分そんなに良くない展開なんだろうな

segments.text: Oh wow, going in with the dair!

segments.original_text: さあ空中Nのカス当たり
弱引っ掛けてから空中後ろ攻撃

full_text: Tech'd, but that's probably not putting him in a great position Playing the patience game here Oh wow, going in with the dair! And there's the weak nair! Jab connects into the bair!

corrections.original: 空中城のカース当たり
corrections.rule: Move: 空中城→空中N; homophone: カース→カス

corrections.original: ジャック引っ掛けてから空中城攻撃
corrections.corrected: 弱引っ掛けてから空中後ろ攻撃
corrections.rule: Move: ジャック→弱; 空中城→空中後ろ
